title: [Hiatus] Bingus Language
description: (This project may not get further updates) Adds a custom meme language to the game called Bingus, replacing every word in the game with it.
body:
Minecraft is not short on joke languages, but I wanted to take it a step further and completely flip the script. This pack adds a custom language called Bingus, where everything in the entire game is replaced with the word Bingus. Menus, button labels, item names, all of it. Inspired by a KH2 mod that does the same thing. It doesn't replace an existing one, so you'll have to enable it yourself.

**_The pack is built on 1.21.10, but should work in 1.20 and below._**

![Minecraft title screen, all the button texts say Bingus instead of their normal descriptions.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/585UjhQR/images/8152506e6a18a60440aa3ee7b01bd618b8fe3a90.png)

![Minecraft video options menu, but every button, slider, and tooltip has its text replaced with the word Bingus.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/585UjhQR/images/170271479c4e4090ce92ea775da29b20dcbce583.png)

![Minecraft language menu, highlighting the newly added Bingus language, which is colored light blue.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/585UjhQR/images/c10242fd85a67811970cbe39101e77fb2b1125c8.png)
